title: centaurea pseudopratensis
intro: Centaurea pseudopratensis, also known as prickly thistle, is a biennial plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Centaurea pseudopratensis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. Centaurea pseudopratensis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
